description_long: This is a cordless electric screwdriver or drill with a robust, ergonomic design. The body is primarily dark green with black and silver accents, featuring a contoured handle for comfortable grip and an orange trigger button. The front section houses a metallic chuck holding a drill bit, and the base contains a rectangular battery pack. Ventilation holes are visible on the rear, and a secondary bit or accessory is attached to the side. The overall construction suggests a durable tool suitable for heavy-duty urban or garage use.
description: A cordless electric screwdriver or drill with a green and black contoured body, silver chuck, and visible battery pack.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green and black body, silver chuck with drill bit, orange trigger, and battery pack.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the ventilation holes and the width of the battery pack.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the handle, trigger, and the drill bit extending from the chuck.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the drill bit, silver chuck, and the symmetry of the handle and battery pack.
attribute_handle_type: contoured, plastic, with visible rubberized grip sections for ergonomics
